description: CompositionBlue sleeveless leopard print top made of 100% cotton, has a racer back, string of pearls from the right shoulder to the left, a bow detail on the left shoulder and embroidered branding above the hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycleDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or lay flat to dryMedium heat steam iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry in sunlightThe snappy print on this colour pop top makes this piece a great buy. Comfy and styled to suit her age, girls will love wearing this!
